name: Burned at the Steak Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the Italian dressing and set aside.
2. In a small saucepan, bring water to a boil and blanch the habaneros for 2 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
3. Remove stems from the peppers and seeds from one pepper, reserving the seeds from one of the peppers.
4. Place the peppers in a blender and add the remaining ingredients. Blend until smooth.
5. Generously coat the steaks with the marinade.
6. Marinate for 3-4 hours.
7. Grill over hot charcoal. Be cautious of the heat.
